api: Codefresh REST API (https://g.codefresh.io/api, OpenAPI spec at https://g.codefresh.io/api/openapi.json)
scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: reviewed the complete live OpenAPI spec (312 paths / 419 method+path operations, fetched from https://g.codefresh.io/api/openapi.json). 10 read streams and 10 write actions now cover the full practical, documented, non-admin data surface: projects/pipelines/agents/contexts (legacy parity) plus builds (GET /workflow), images, registries, triggers, trigger_events, and annotations (new in this pass), and create/update/delete/run actions for projects/pipelines/contexts/agents. The remaining ~400 operations are genuinely out of scope: deep Kubernetes/Helm cluster-proxy passthrough, GitOps/Argo CD environment-v2 integration, account/customer/IDP/ABAC/service-user administration, and a handful of resources (team, clusters, step-types, runtime-environments, audit) whose GET response bodies the API's own OpenAPI spec documents only as a bare {type: object} placeholder with no field list -- no field-accurate schema/fixture can be authored for those honestly from the published spec alone.
